required_tools: GitHub push/PR only after explicit safe gate

notes: Developer backend UI module entitlement, independent login configuration, true Host portal login, system announcement lifecycle, system config/API Key lifecycle, platform plan lifecycle, AI/OCR configuration lifecycle, third-party integration/security/monitoring/logs lifecycle, and now payments/invoices/storage observability are covered by real Chrome. S23 covers payment search/status/API read-back, invoice create/issue/API read-back, developer-only API 403 checks, and storage stats/tenant/file read-back after real enterprise upload. Per the user's latest confirmation, WMS inventory alert / 库存预警 is out of product scope and must not be restored or included in future acceptance matrices; labor risk warnings, system announcement warning type, and face-recognition thresholds remain unrelated and intact. Product Green remains Yellow until production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download coverage are complete.
